## Description

What does this change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Hardware / 3D models
- [ ] Firmware

## Testing

How was this verified? (Build output, bench measurement, printed part photos,
platform tested.) Hardware measurements belong in docs/BENCH_LOG.md as part
of this PR.

## Sync checklist

- [ ] Walked the change-propagation table (docs/WORKFLOW.md section 5);
      every file on my change's row is updated in this PR
- [ ] Models: `.scad` source and regenerated STLs committed together
- [ ] Firmware: gaming vs drive differences expressed in Kconfig, not
      runtime flags
